data.body:
## Description
Run all v2 RED tests and validate.sh --ci to confirm full cleanup.

## Verification commands
1. bash tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh
2. bash tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh
3. bash tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh
4. bash tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh
5. bash tests/hooks/test-review-stop-check.sh (v2 assertion at line 13-26)
6. bash tests/hooks/test-v2-hooks-cleanup.sh (new from Task 1)
7. bash tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh (new from Task 3)
8. validate.sh --ci

## TDD Requirement
Exemption: no code changes — verification-only task (static asset criterion 3).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All v2 RED tests pass
  Verify: for t in tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh; do bash "$t" 2>&1 | tail -1; done | grep -c 'FAILED: 0' | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: ./plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
